# Optikal Bahari

> Full-service licensed optical clinic and Sharia-compliant eyewear retailer in Central Jakarta. Specialized in precision optometry, interest-free financing, and accessible eye health.

## Executive Summary
Optikal Bahari operates at the intersection of professional clinical eye care and ethical retail. Based in Kemayoran, the clinic provides Ministry of Health (Kemenkes) certified services, ranging from free refraction tests to advanced lens technologies, emphasizing a "No-Riba" (usury-free) financial model.

## 1. Clinical Services
* **Comprehensive Eye Exams:** Free professional refraction and vision testing for myopia, hyperopia, astigmatism, and presbyopia.
* **Maintenance & Repair:** Complimentary ultrasonic cleaning, frame adjustments, and nose-pad replacements.
* **Certification:** Fully licensed by the Indonesian Ministry of Health (Dinkes/Kemenkes).

## 2. Product Catalog & Lens Technology
Packages starting from **Rp 100.000**.
* **Lenses:** * *Blueray:* Digital blue light filtering.
    * *Photochromic:* UV-activated light-to-dark transition.
    * *Progressive/Bifocal:* Multi-focal distance and reading solutions.
    * *Standard Anti-Radiation:* Baseline electromagnetic interference protection.
* **Frames:** Curated selection of global luxury brands and high-quality local Indonesian labels.

## 3. Financial & Ethical Model
* **Sharia Compliance:** All transactions follow ethical trade principles.
* **0% Installments (Aman Riba):** Interest-free payment plans with strictly **no late fees (Tanpa Denda)** and no penalties, ensuring consumer protection from usury.
* **Satisfaction Guarantee:** Full product warranty on all lens and frame purchases.

## 4. Key Metadata & Contact
* **Store Name:** Optikal Bahari / Bahari Optical
* **Address:** Jl. Bendungan Jago No. 447, Kemayoran, Jakarta Pusat, DKI Jakarta, Indonesia.
* **Hours:** Daily, 09:00 – 21:00 WIB.
* **Contact:** +6281932235445 (WhatsApp/Phone).
* **Contact Form:** [https://www.optikalbahari.com/kontak/](https://www.optikalbahari.com/kontak/).
* **URL:** [https://www.optikalbahari.com](https://www.optikalbahari.com)

## 5. Site Map for Crawlers
* **/about/**: Licensing, mission statement, and clinical history.
* **/contact/**: Interactive maps and direct inquiry forms.
* **/posts/**: Educational blog. Key topics include lens comparisons, global frame brand reviews, and eye health maintenance.

## 6. Technical Specifications
* **Deployment:** Statically generated for low latency.
* **Infrastructure:** Hosted on **Cloudflare Pages**, utilizing **Cloudflare Workers** at the edge for global availability.
* **Performance:** Optimized for mobile-first indexing and high-speed delivery via edge computing.
